itinerary.title: Grand France Tour
itinerary.tagline: Paris • Versailles • Loire Valley Castles • Bordeaux Vineyards • French Riviera (Nice/
itinerary.overview:
Monaco) 08 Nights / 09 Days Ultra-Luxury Grand France Showcase SERIAL CODE: FR-005 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-FRA-GRD-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: France CATEGORY: Grand Luxury France Tour Package DURATION: 08 Nights / 09 Days Paris (3N) • Loire Valley (2N) • Bordeaux (2N) • French Riviera (2N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute pinnacle of French elegance with our TRAGUIN curated Grand Expedition. This ultimate journey explores the royal architecture of Paris and Versailles, the historic fairytale castles of the Loire Valley, the prestigious vineyards of Bordeaux, and the glamour of the French Riviera. A truly unforgettable experience for the most discerning travelers. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days France package (FR-005 / TRG-FRA-GRD-2026): Paris • Versailles • Loire Valley Castles • Bordeaux Vineyards • French Riviera (Nice/.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN PARIS
days.description: Arrive in Paris, private transfer to a palatial hotel. Enjoy a welcome dinner at a Michelin-starred restaurant with views of the Eiffel Tower.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PARIS ART & HISTORY
days.description: Private guided tour of the Louvre followed by a walk through the charming Marais district. Evening private Seine cruise.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PALACE OF VERSAILLES
days.description: Private tour of Versailles' Royal Apartments and the expansive gardens. Evening at leisure.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LOIRE VALLEY CASTLES
days.description: Travel to the Loire Valley. Private exploration of the stunning Château de Chambord and Château de Chenonceau.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LOIRE VALLEY WINERIES
days.description: Enjoy a private tasting tour at local vineyards followed by an afternoon in the charming city of Tours.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: BORDEAUX VINEYARDS
days.description: Travel to Bordeaux. Private visit to legendary wine estates of Saint-Émilion. Gastronomic dinner featuring local wines.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: BORDEAUX HERITAGE
days.description: Explore the historic centre of Bordeaux, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and its contemporary wine museum, La Cité du Vin.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FRENCH RIVIERA GLAMOUR
days.description: Flight to the Riviera. Check into a world-class seaside palace hotel in Nice. Sunset walk along the Promenade des Anglais.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MONACO & DEPARTURE
days.description: Private excursion to Monaco. Explore the Prince’s Palace and the Monte Carlo Casino before your flight from Nice.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Paris • Versailles • Loire Valley Castles • Bordeaux Vineyards • French Riviera (Nice/
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Private guided Paris sightseeing including Eiffel Tower, Louvre, and Versailles
French Riviera and Monaco elite coastal experiences
Curated wine country and heritage castle experiences
International airfare and France/Schengen entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
